free_text: Photoneutron cross sections on nickel isotopes.
Total photoneutron  production  cross sections for two
isotopes,  58Ni and 60Ni,  are obtained in the region
of the giant dipole resonance.  They have complicated
structures  and  large  widths.  The  integral  cross
section  up  to 30 MeV is 380 MeV*mb for 58Ni and 800
Data have been compiled at the Russia MSU
